nl_query: Count blocked scripts per block reason category.
failed_sql:
SELECT b.block_status, COUNT(*) AS script_count
FROM   answer_script      a
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   board b ON b.course_id = a.course_id AND b.exam_id = a.exam_id
WHERE  b.block_status IS NOT NULL
GROUP  BY b.block_status, b.block_reason
ORDER  BY script_count DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated table(s): answer_script asr. These tables do not exist in the schema.
